regions.text: This is a spoon. It is in my hand. This is a spoon which is in my hand.
That is a glass of water. It is on the table. That is a glass of water which is on the table.
This is a bone. It was in the dog's mouth. This is a bone which was in the dog's mouth.
This is a dog. He had the bone.
This is the dog who had it.
